violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bathroom were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
Deceased small rodent was observed in trap. Trap was disposed and area was cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
Lights above walk-in cooler/ prep space were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
Several ceiling tiles in the back were observed in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026
Half a log of deli meat was observed with a mold like substance on it. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The slicer was cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Various meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were added to the foods at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler and one door freezer. The handle on the one door freezer was observed missing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024
The condensate from the display case refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The door to the toilet room in the back prep area is not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open into food prep/storage area must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The walls behind the prep tables in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
